_publications._publicationTitle: Transplanting neurofibromatosis-1 gene knockout neural stem cells improve functional recovery in rats with spinal cord injury by enhancing the mTORC2 pathway.

_contextSnippet: TUNEL staining showed that compared with that of the control and LV-vector-treated NSCs, the number of TUNEL-positive cells significantly decreased in the NF-1 knockout NSCs
details: Successfully detected apoptotic cells, showing significantly decreased TUNEL-positive cells in NF-1 knockout NSCs compared to controls after TNF-α treatment
